task_completion.description: Verify that the Jurism (or Zotero) application is open.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Jurism/Zotero main application window is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Miranda v. Arizona' case is selected in the library.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The item 'Miranda v. Arizona' is highlighted or selected in the central pane of the Jurism library.

task_completion.description: Verify that the agent locates the correct PDF file in the specified directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file selection dialog or a file manager window is open, showing the path 'Documents/CaseFiles/Project_X/' and the file 'Miranda_Opinion.pdf' is visible or selected.

task_completion.description: Verify that the agent initiates the action to attach the file specifically as a link.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent clicks on 'Attach Link to File...' in the Jurism attachment menu, or is seen dragging the file into Jurism with a visual indicator of creating a link.

task_completion.description: Verify that the file is successfully attached to the case as a linked file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: 'Miranda_Opinion.pdf' appears as a child attachment under 'Miranda v. Arizona' in the library. The PDF icon must have a small chain link overlay (or the right pane must indicate it is a linked file), confirming it is not a stored copy.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent used the graphical user interface to attach the file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the Jurism GUI and file dialogs/managers, not terminal commands modifying the database directly.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent interacted with the actual Jurism application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The application shown is the genuine Jurism/Zotero software, not a text editor or mock-up.

integrity.description: Verify that the file was not imported as a stored copy.
integrity.visual_evidence: The attachment icon must not be a plain PDF icon without a link overlay, and the right-hand pane should not show the file as stored in the Zotero/Jurism storage directory.

privileged_info_for_vlm:
Case Name: Miranda v. Arizona
File Path: /home/ga/Documents/CaseFiles/Project_X/Miranda_Opinion.pdf
Expected Filename: Miranda_Opinion.pdf
Expected Link Mode: 2 (Linked File)
The VLM should ensure the file is attached specifically as a link, which is visually indicated in Jurism by a chain link icon on the attachment, rather than a standard PDF icon which would indicate a stored copy.
